nasb.text: Moses slaughtered it and took some of its blood and put it on the lobe of Aaron’s right ear, and on the thumb of his right hand and on the big toe of his right foot.

esv.text: And he killed it, and Moses took some of its blood and put it on the lobe of Aaron’s right ear and on the thumb of his right hand and on the big toe of his right foot.

cnv.text: 摩西宰殺了羊，取了一些羊血，抹在亞倫的右耳垂上和右手的大拇指上，以及右腳的大拇趾上。

ccb.text: 摩西宰了羊，将一些羊血抹在亚伦的右耳垂、右手大拇指和右脚大脚趾上。
